sect2.title: A Manual for Pediatric Documentation and Payment 31ST EDITION
sect2.para: The 31st edition of this American Academy of Pediatrics (AAP) cornerstone coding publication includes 2026 updates to the Current Procedural Terminology (CPT®) and International Classification of Diseases, 10th Revision, Clinical Modification (ICD-10-CM) code sets—complete with expert guidance for their application. The book's many clinical vignettes, examples, and tips help ensure accuracy and timely payment.

sect4.title: Key updates in this edition include

listitem.para: Coding for immunization counseling when one or more immunizations are not administered
Appropriate use of new codes for immunization products and administration
Reporting less than 20 minutes spent in monthly remote physiologic monitoring treatment management
New codes for orthopedic and neurological services
Updated compliance program guidance with examples for small and large practices

sect4.title: Additional Pediatric Coding Resources From the American Academy of Pediatrics
sect4.para: *AAP Pediatric Coding Newsletter™* Streamline coding with a subscription to the AAP Pediatric Coding Newsletter. Each issue is packed with time-saving how-to strategies to help your practice reduce errors, avoid over/under-coding, and get payment approved more quickly. It also provides critical code updates, covers correct use of modifiers, and explains how to code for AAP policy statements, clinical reports, and technical reports. Visit http://publications.aap.org/codingnews to download a sample issue or subscribe today.

*Pediatric ICD-10-CM 2026: A Manual for Provider-Based Coding, 11th Edition* The completely updated 11th edition includes all new 2026 pediatric ICD-10-CM codes, including updated or new for birth and obstetric trauma, intracranial injury, chronic kidney disease, paralytic ileus and intestinal obstruction, hepatic failure, chronic hepatitis, and much more.

sect2.title: To order these and other pediatric coding resources, visit shopAAP
sect2.para: DEDICATED TO THE HEALTH OF ALL CHILDREN®
